title: Boho Round Macrame Mirror
excerpt: Transform a simple round mirror into a stunning bohemian statement piece.
materials: Metal ring slightly larger than mirror

steps.title: Prepare the base
steps.description: Glue the mirror to the center back of the metal ring and let dry completely.

steps.title: Attach cords
steps.description: Cut 30-40 cords and attach around the ring using lark's head knots.

steps.title: Create the frame
steps.description: Work 2-3 rows of square knots around the mirror, spacing evenly.

steps.title: Finish with fringe
steps.description: Trim cords to desired length, unravel, and brush out for a soft fringe effect.

tips: Use a template to ensure even spacing of knots
Consider adding a second smaller ring for a layered look

videoTutorials.title: DIY Macrame Mirror Tutorial for beginners | Macrame Series Pt-1 | DIYwithPragya
